description: Two-pass fallback (never go silent): a shuffle-order avoid_duplicates playlist from which all tracks (m1 and m2) were recently played. Pass 1 strictly avoids duplicates (including the internal reset-and-retry) and finds none, so it returns nothing; pass 2 allows duplicates and falls back to the least-recently-played track. m1 was played longer ago (11:50) than m2 (11:55), so the playlist still plays m1 rather than leaving the station silent.
